backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with a comment indicating all AI chat functionality is handled client-side via external APIs with no backend logic required.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features (AI chat, title generator, script generator, SEO checker, tags generator) with associated files, components, test IDs, and high confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing the purpose and functionality of each component and configuration file.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables including slate and emerald color palettes for the CreatorVerse brand.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, page title 'CreatorVerse AI PRO', and script reference to the React TypeScript main module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component orchestrating layout with header, footer, and grid of content generation tools (chat, title, script, SEO, tags, hashtags, voice, thumbnail) using shared topic state.
frontend/src/components/ChatInterface.ts: AI chat component with scrollable message history that provides YouTube creator advice through keyword pattern matching, displaying user and AI messages with icons.
frontend/src/components/HashtagGenerator: Component that generates social media hashtags by removing spaces from the topic and appending standard viral YouTube hashtags.
Component that generates structured YouTube video scripts with emoji-decorated sections for hook, intro, three main points, and call-to-action using the shared topic.
frontend/src/components/SEOChecker.tsx: SEO score calculator that evaluates topic length (score = length × 5, max 100) and provides optimization tips with score-based feedback messages.
frontend/src/components/TagsGenerator.ts: Component that creates comma-separated YouTube tags by combining the topic with standard keywords: viral, youtube growth, trending video, and how to.
frontend/src/components/ThumbnailGenerat: React component that renders a canvas-based thumbnail generator with a yellow background, allowing users to input text and generate centered, word-wrapped text overlays on a 400x250 canvas.
frontend/src/components/TitleGenerator.t: React component that generates clickbait-style video titles by combining user-provided topics with random hooks like '🔥 Secret of' or 'Ultimate Guide to'.
frontend/src/components/VoiceGenerator.t: React component that uses the Web Speech API to convert text to speech with five voice styles (normal, deep, soft, robot, fast) by adjusting rate and pitch parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor using React Query, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining CSS custom properties for a dark-themed design system with color variables for backgrounds, borders, and chart colors using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom color palettes (slate, emerald, yellow), OKLCH color variables, container settings, and animation keyframes for accordion components.
project_state.json: Project state file for CreatorVerse AI PRO, a single-page YouTube content creator tool with AI chat, title/script/tags/hashtag generators, SEO checker, AI voice generator (5 styles), and thumbnail generator. Uses Web Speech API, Canvas API, and client-side only implementation with dark theme.
